required_preferences.fact: Never skips breakfast — always eats a morning meal due to medication scheduling, but may shorten lunch or adjust meal timing instead

required_preferences.fact: Stays indoors for weekend recreation — replaces nature trail rides with indoor activities like reading and streaming documentaries while recovering from her wrist fracture
